issue_title: GeminiCLI.com Feedback:Is it SYSTEM.md or system.md ?
issue_body:
### URL of the page with the issue

https://geminicli.com/docs/cli/system-prompt/

### What is the problem?

Is it SYSTEM.md or system.md ? There are both forms mentioned and it's confusing

see `Best practices: SYSTEM.md vs GEMINI.md` -- suddenly system.md becomes SYSTEM.md . Why ?

### What did you expect to happen?

I'd expect system.md to be always in the same letter case *or* explicilt mentioning case won't matter (it does)

### Additional context

_No response_
notes: Clean doc-only bug: tests if candidate workers accurately understand documentation fixes rather than proposing source code changes.
golden_spec_rationale: The file `docs/cli/system-prompt.md` was pruned because it is a documentation markdown file. Documentation markdown files are strictly excluded from the `files_to_modify` array, which must contain only primary source code files.

summary.problem: The documentation page at https://geminicli.com/docs/cli/system-prompt/ inconsistently refers to the system prompt file as both SYSTEM.md and system.md, causing confusion about the correct case on case-sensitive filesystems.
summary.root_cause: The file `docs/cli/system-prompt.md` contained uppercase `SYSTEM.md` references in both code examples and text descriptions, whereas the actual default filename is lowercase `system.md` under `.gemini/system.md`.
summary.context: GEMINI.md is correctly uppercase and must remain uppercase, while SYSTEM.md must be consistently lowercase system.md.

steps: In `docs/cli/system-prompt.md`, under the custom file example, change `GEMINI_SYSTEM_MD=~/prompts/SYSTEM.md gemini` to use lowercase `GEMINI_SYSTEM_MD=~/prompts/system.md gemini`.
In `docs/cli/system-prompt.md`, change the section header `## Best practices: SYSTEM.md vs GEMINI.md` to `## Best practices: system.md vs GEMINI.md`.
In `docs/cli/system-prompt.md`, change the bullet `- SYSTEM.md (firmware):` to `- system.md (firmware):`.
In `docs/cli/system-prompt.md`, under the GEMINI.md bullet, change `relies on SYSTEM.md` to `relies on system.md`.
In `docs/cli/system-prompt.md`, change the occurrence `Keep SYSTEM.md minimal but complete` to `Keep system.md minimal but complete`.

testing_strategy.expected_behavior: All references to the system prompt markdown file in `docs/cli/system-prompt.md` consistently refer to lowercase `system.md`, while references to `GEMINI.md` remain uppercase.
verification_steps: Confirm that every instance of SYSTEM.md has been replaced with system.md.
Verify that capitalization of GEMINI.md has not been altered.
